tool_input.command: bash /home/tie303177/work/nabledge/work1/.claude/skills/nabledge-6/scripts/full-text-search.sh "入力チェック" "バリデーション" "エラーメッセージ" "validation" "ErrorMessage" "バリデーションエラー" "入力値チェック" "エラー" "error message"

cd /home/tie303177/work/nabledge/work1 && for f in \
  "knowledge/component/libraries/libraries-validation.json" \
  "knowledge/component/libraries/libraries-bean-validation.json" \
  "knowledge/component/libraries/libraries-nablarch-validation.json" \
  "knowledge/processing-pattern/web-application/web-application-error-message.json" \
  "knowledge/component/handlers/handlers-jaxrs-bean-validation-handler.json" \
  "knowledge/processing-pattern/restful-web-service/restful-web-service-feature-details.json"; do
  jq -r --arg f "$f" '.sections[] | "\($f)|\(.id)"' ".claude/skills/nabledge-6/$f" 2>/dev/null
done
tool_input.description: List all section IDs from candidate knowledge files
Read knowledge file sections for validation error message handling
